chunks.page_summary: This page provides detailed variable dimensions for the SRV Tri-Clamp adapter, including standard and optional sizes, and features a dimensioned drawing of the sensor body and probe in both millimeters and inches.

key_facts: Tri-Clamp adapters are compatible with ISO/DIN/ASME standards.
Rheonics provides multiple Tri-Clamp adapter diameter options: 50.5mm, 64mm, 77.5mm, 91mm, and 106mm.
The product dimensions are provided in both millimeters and inches.
Rheonics offers inline process density and viscosity monitoring solutions.
